case_title: FAHMI NOOMANI VS. BRANDON M. VUONG et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-11-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDON M. VUONG, AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST ALL DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-25-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2010, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
